_comment: Hand-derived from SPEC.md § Validation (the DB.md-structure rules) and from exactly what bad-db-md/DB.md breaks — never copied from tool output. Running `dbmd validate --all --json tests/corpora/corpus-b-edges/bad-db-md` (a sub-store whose DB.md violates the identity contract) MUST emit exactly these five issues and exit non-zero. This is a SEPARATE invocation from the corpus-b --all sweep: the sweep checks only `<root>/DB.md` and walks sources/records under the root, so it never descends into this sibling. Line numbers are intent-derived: DB_MD_BAD_TYPE anchors to the `type:` key line (file line 2); DB_MD_MISSING_FIELD for an ABSENT field anchors to the frontmatter block top (line 1); DB_MD_UNKNOWN_SECTION anchors to the offending `##` heading's file line (the `## Glossary` heading at line 18); the two DB_MD_SCHEMA_FIELD unique-key warnings anchor to the `### expense` schema heading (line 31), one per non-required key field (`amount` undeclared, `vendor` declared but optional — an incomplete key is silently skipped by the unique check). Issues sorted by (file, line, code).

issues.message: DB.md frontmatter is missing required field `owner`
DB.md has `type: notes`; a store's DB.md must be `type: db-md`
issues.suggestion: set `type: db-md` in the DB.md frontmatter

issues.message: DB.md has an unrecognized `## Glossary` section
issues.suggestion: DB.md sections are `## Agent instructions`, `## Policies`, `## Schemas` — remove or rename this heading

issues.message: `### expense` `unique:` key field `amount` is not declared in the schema, so it can never be `required` — a record missing it is silently skipped by the unique check
issues.suggestion: mark `amount` `required` in `### expense`, or build the `unique:` key from required fields only

issues.message: `### expense` `unique:` key field `vendor` is not `required` — a record missing or leaving it empty is silently skipped by the unique check
issues.suggestion: mark `vendor` `required` in `### expense`, or build the `unique:` key from required fields only
